key.name: draw-contours
key.description: Controls edge-detection detail. Default 2; try values 0–10. Smaller values produce more detail.

key.name: draw-hatch
key.description: Space between hatching lines used to represent shading. Default 16; try values 8–16. Smaller values produce more detail.

key.name: repeat-contours
key.description: Number of times to repeat outer edge lines so they stand out in the final drawing. Default 0.

key.name: sftp-hostname
key.description: Hostname or IP address of the BrachioGraph device.

key.name: sftp-directory
key.description: Path on the remote device where JSON files are uploaded.

key.name: last-image-directory
key.description: Remembered so the file chooser opens in the same place.
